title: Deep Tissue Massage in the Clinical Approach
description: Six days of hands-on training, working through the body region by region: foot and lower leg, thigh and pelvis, deep hip flexors and diaphragm, shoulder girdle, neck and jaw. The approach starts with an interview, posture analysis and palpation, and the treatment follows from what the assessment shows rather than from a fixed protocol.
detail: Neuro Projekt · 52 teaching hours (39 clock hours) · 5–10.12.2023
